updates.title: Can PPF investors open multiple accounts in different banks? Rules explained
updates.summary: The Public Provident Fund (PPF) is a government-backed savings scheme in India, offering 7.1% interest with tax benefits. Individuals can only maintain one account to prevent misuse of tax benefits.
